# artifact_doc_links.csv

**Generated by:** [generate_connector_docs.py](../generate_connector_docs.md)
**Granularity:** One row per generated markdown documentation artifact
**Type:** Mapping / edge table

## Overview

Relative-link map for documentation artifacts. Each row contains the markdown page path and its corresponding HTML page path, enabling external systems to deep-link directly to rendered HTML while keeping markdown cross-references.

The file is generated by `generate_connector_docs.py` and written to `Tools/Solutions Analyzer/artifact_doc_links.csv` by default (configurable with `--artifact-links-csv`).

## Use Cases

- Deep-link integration from external systems to generated docs.
- Building cross-system navigation indexes without parsing markdown.
- Publishing pipelines that need both markdown and HTML path variants.
- Kusto upload for lookup/join scenarios (uploaded as `solution_analyzer_artifact_doc_links`).

## Columns

| Column | Description | Data Source |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `artifact_type` | Inferred artifact category (`solution`, `connector`, `table`, `content`, `parser`, `asim_parser`, `index`, etc.) | Derived from markdown relative path |
| `artifact_name` | Markdown filename stem | Markdown filename |
| `markdown_relative_path` | Markdown path relative to docs root (for example `solutions/abc.md`) | Generated docs tree |
| `html_relative_path` | HTML path relative to docs root (for example `solutions/abc.html`) | Derived from markdown path |
| `markdown_site_relative_path` | Markdown path relative to site root (prefixes `--html-docs-path` when relative) | Generated from `--html-docs-path` + markdown path |
| `html_site_relative_path` | HTML path relative to site root (prefixes `--html-docs-path` when relative) | Generated from `--html-docs-path` + html path |

## Related CSVs

- [connectors.csv](connectors.md), [solutions.csv](solutions.md), [tables.csv](tables.md), [content_items.csv](content_items.md) — entity metadata for joining with deep links.
- [solutions_connectors_tables_mapping_simplified.csv](solutions_connectors_tables_mapping_simplified.md), [content_tables_mapping.csv](content_tables_mapping.md) — relationship graph tables often used with artifact links.
